name: payment-scam-firewall
description: Agent-ready payment email investigation for invoice scams, supplier impersonation, and bank-detail redirection.
long_description: Adds one local MCP tool, analyze_payment_email, that inspects a .eml file through the Payment Scam Firewall project and returns SAFE, VERIFY, or DO_NOT_PAY with evidence and human verification steps. The bridge does not return full email bodies, raw headers, or attachment content.

tools.name: analyze_payment_email
tools.description: Analyze a local .eml invoice or payment email and return SAFE, VERIFY, or DO_NOT_PAY with evidence and verification steps.

python_executable.title: Python executable
python_executable.description: Python executable with the project's dependencies installed.
